articles.description: 15-4-2025 – Canada is poised to unveil the world’s inaugural spot Solana Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs) on 16 April 2025, amidst a remarkable 25% surge in the digital asset’s value over the past seven days. The groundbreaking initiative introduces a novel staking mechanism through TD Bank, distinguishing these investment vehicles from conventional cryptocurrency ETFs. This innovative [.
